# testing/utility/env.utility

Environment variable helpers for test isolation of the `PORT` configuration.

## Functions

| Function                                  | Description                                                 |
| ----------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| [clearPortEnv](functions/clearPortEnv.md) | Removes the `PORT` environment variable for test isolation. |
| [setPortEnv](functions/setPortEnv.md)     | Sets the `PORT` environment variable.                       |
